text:
I'm not receiving emails from portscout for a long time.

2015-12-04 - created bugreport for updating graphics/pngcrush to 1.7.88
2015-12-31 - 1.7.91 out, didn't receive email
2016-01-03 - 1.7.92 out, didn't receive email
2016-01-17 - 1.8.0 out, didn't receive email
